request.description: Add activity filter tabs, pipeline sharing and export import functionality and built in templates
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Forge (formerly Catbot)

### 1.2 Application Description
A multi-persona AI chat platform with debate rooms, group chat capabilities, and visual pipeline builder. Users can build customizable AI personas, share them publicly, engage in one-on-one conversations, participate in multi-persona group debates, join real-time debate rooms with fact-checking, orchestrate multi-step AI pipelines, and manage AI agents. Built on React + TypeScript + Supabase stack.

### 1.3 Version Update
v17 → v18 Phase 5 Final Beta → v19 Production Release → v20 Pipeline Builder Update → v21 Activity Filters, Pipeline Sharing & Templates

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users wanting to create and customize AI personas with specific personalities
- Users seeking to orchestrate multi-persona group debates with 2-6 AI personas responding in real-time
- Users needing organized conversation management with search capabilities
- Users wanting to participate in real-time group debates with AI fact-checking
- Users building multi-step AI processing pipelines with sequential persona execution
- Users sharing pipelines with others via public links
- Users exporting/importing pipeline configurations as JSON files
- Users exploring built-in pipeline templates for common workflows
- Anonymous users joining debate rooms without accounts
- External visitors landing on public persona pages
- First-time visitors needing guided onboarding experience
- Users exploring public persona gallery for discovery
- Users evaluating pricing tiers and purchasing credits
- Users managing AI agents and workflows in Agent Studio
- Users filtering activity history by type in Settings

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating AI personas with customizable traits and behaviors
- Starting multi-persona group chat sessions with selected personas responding live
- Managing group chat sessions with ability to add/remove personas mid-session
- Building visual pipelines with sequential AI persona processing steps
- Running pipelines with step-by-step streaming output
- Sharing pipelines via public links for others to view and clone
- Exporting pipeline configurations as JSON files
- Importing pipeline configurations from JSON files
- Using built-in pipeline templates for common workflows
- Filtering activity history by type (Chat, Pipeline, Group Chat, Persona)
- Searching through conversation history quickly
- Switching between different personas during chat
- Creating debate rooms with specific topics and access controls
- Joining debate rooms anonymously or with display names
- Fact-checking messages in real-time with AI-powered verdicts
- Viewing dashboard with usage stats and quick-start actions
- Browsing persona library with category filters and preview modals
- Comparing pricing tiers and purchasing credits via Stripe
- Managing API keys for multiple providers in settings
- Exporting conversations as PDF or Markdown
- Reviewing recent activity history in settings

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Forge (Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform)
├── Dashboard/Home Page (/) - UPDATED
│   ├── Usage Stats Cards
│   ├── Quick-Start Cards (4 features)
│   └── Active Rooms Sidebar
├── Sidebar Navigation - REDESIGNED
│   ├── Section: Core Features
│   │   ├── Dashboard (icon + label)
│   │   ├── AI Chat (icon + label)
│   │   ├── Group Chat (icon + label)
│   │   ├── Debate Rooms (icon + label)
│   │   └── Pipeline Builder (icon + label)
│   ├── Section: Tools
│   │   ├── Agent Studio (icon + label)
│   │   └── Personas (icon + label)
│   ├── Section: Account
│   │   ├── Credits (icon + label)
│   │   └── Settings (icon + label)
│   └── Footer: BETA badge + Give Feedback link
├── First-Run Onboarding Modal
│   ├── Step 1: Welcome
│   ├── Step 2: Build a Persona
│   ├── Step 3: Chat with AI
│   ├── Step 4: Join a Debate Room
│   └── Step 5: Share & Explore
├── AI Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
│   ├── Conversation Sidebar with Search
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector Dropdown - ENHANCED
│   ├── Web Search Toggle - NEW
│   ├── Persona Quick-Switch - ENHANCED
│   ├── Export Conversation Button - NEW
│   └── Chat Input Area
├── Multi-Persona Group Chat
│   ├── Group Chat Sessions List (/group-chat)
│   └── Group Chat Room (/group-chat/:sessionId)
│       ├── Persona Selector Panel
│       ├── Live Chat Thread
│       ├── Per-Persona Typing Indicators
│       ├── Session Controls (add/remove personas)
│       └── Save Session Button
├── Pipeline Builder (/studio) - UPDATED
│   ├── Pipeline List View
│   │   ├── Templates Section - NEW
│   │   │   ├── Research Report Template Card
│   │   │   ├── Blog Post Template Card
│   │   │   └── Code Review Template Card
│   │   ├── Saved Pipelines Grid
│   │   ├── New Pipeline Button
│   │   ├── Import from JSON Button - NEW
│   │   └── Pipeline Cards (name, step count, last run)
│   └── Pipeline Editor View
│       ├── Pipeline Name Input
│       ├── Toolbar - UPDATED
│       │   ├── Share Button - NEW
│       │   ├── Export to JSON Button - NEW
│       │   ├── Save Pipeline Button
│       │   └── Delete Pipeline Button
│       ├── Visual Node Chain (horizontal scrollable)
│       │   ├── Step Cards with arrows between
│       │   ├── Add Step Button
│       │   └── Delete Step Button per card
│       ├── Step Configuration Panel
│       │   ├── Persona Selector Dropdown
│       │   ├── Custom Instruction/Prompt Override Input
│       │   └── Pass-Through Toggle
│       ├── Pipeline Execution Panel
│       │   ├── Initial Input Textarea
│       │   ├── Run Pipeline Button
│       │   └── Step-by-Step Streaming Output Display
│       └── Run History Section (last 10 runs)
├── Pipeline Public Share Page (/studio/share/:shareId) - NEW
│   ├── Pipeline Name Display
│   ├── Steps Overview (read-only)
│   ├── Collaboration Mode Display
│   └── Clone to My Studio Button
├── Persona Management
│   ├── Persona Library Page (/personas) - COMPLETED
│   │   ├── Category Filter Tabs
│   │   ├── Search Bar
│   │   ├── Persona Preview Modals
│   │   └── 1-Click Start Chat Button
│   ├── Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
│   └── Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
├── Agent Studio (/agent-studio) - ALREADY REBUILT
├── Credits & Pricing Page (/credits) - STRIPE INTEGRATION COMPLETE
│   ├── Plan Cards with Purchase Flow
│   └── Transaction History Section
├── Debate Rooms
│   ├── Rooms List Page (/rooms)
│   ├── Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
│   └── Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
├── Creator Dashboard (/dashboard)
├── Settings Page (/settings) - UPDATED
│   ├── API Key Management (all providers)
│   ├── Add/Remove/Test Key Flows
│   ├── Account Preferences
│   └── Recent Activity Section - UPDATED
│       ├── Activity Filter Tabs - NEW
│       │   ├── All Tab
│       │   ├── Chat Tab
│       │   ├── Pipeline Tab
│       │   ├── Group Chat Tab
│       │   └── Persona Tab
│       └── Activity List (filtered by selected tab)
├── Contacts Page (/contacts) - ALREADY FIXED
├── System Test Page (/system-test) - ALREADY FIXED
└── 404 Not Found Page
```

### 3.1 Dashboard/Home Page (/) - UPDATED
**Purpose:** Central landing page showing platform overview and quick access to all features

**Core Functions:**
- Display usage stats cards: total conversations, personas created, debate rooms joined, credits remaining
- Provide 4 quick-start cards with CTAs:
  + AI Chat: Start a new conversation
  + Group Chat: Launch multi-persona debate
  + Agent Studio: Build an agent
  + Debate Rooms: Join or create a room
- Include active rooms sidebar showing live debate rooms
- Recent activity feed removed (moved to Settings page)

**Visual Requirements:**
- Glassmorphism panels for stats cards
- Animated gradient accents on quick-start cards
- Particle/grid background on hero section
- Smooth hover animations on interactive elements
- Electric violet design system

### 3.2 Sidebar Navigation - UPDATED
**Purpose:** Organized navigation with clear section groupings

**Core Functions:**
- Section 1 Core Features:
  + Dashboard (home icon)
  + AI Chat (chat bubble icon)
  + Group Chat (multiple personas icon)
  + Debate Rooms (debate icon)
  + Pipeline Builder (flow diagram icon)
- Section 2 Tools:
  + Agent Studio (robot icon)
  + Personas (mask icon)
- Section 3 Account:
  + Credits (coin icon)
  + Settings (gear icon)
- Footer area:
  + BETA badge
  + Give Feedback link
- Active state highlighting for current page
- Hover effects on navigation items

**Visual Requirements:**
- Section dividers with subtle lines
- Icons for each navigation item
- Active state with electric violet accent
- Smooth hover transitions
- Collapsed/expanded states for mobile

### 3.3 Multi-Persona Group Chat

#### 3.3.1 Group Chat Sessions List (/group-chat)
**Purpose:** Manage and access multi-persona group chat sessions

**Core Functions:**
- Display list of saved group chat sessions
- Show session preview: topic, participating personas (avatars), last message timestamp
- \"New Group Chat\" CTA button
- Search and filter sessions
- Delete session option

**Visual Requirements:**
- Session cards with glassmorphism effect
- Persona avatars displayed in row
- Hover lift effect on cards
- Empty state with illustration and CTA

#### 3.3.2 Group Chat Room (/group-chat/:sessionId)
**Purpose:** Real-time multi-persona group debate interface

**Core Functions:**
- Persona selector panel: pick 2-6 personas from library
- Live chat thread displaying:
  + User message
  + Each selected persona's response in sequence
  + Each persona sees prior persona responses in thread
- Per-persona typing indicators with distinct avatar colors
- Session controls:
  + Add persona button (opens persona selector)
  + Remove persona button (removes from active session)
  + Save session button
- Full chat history with scroll
- Message input area for user

**Visual Requirements:**
- Persona selector as sidebar or modal
- Chat messages with persona avatar and name
- Typing indicators with animated dots and persona color
- Distinct visual styling per persona (color-coded borders or backgrounds)
- Glassmorphism panels for controls
- Smooth animations for persona responses streaming in

**Interaction Flow:**
1. User selects 2-6 personas from library
2. User sends a message
3. Each persona responds in sequence, seeing prior responses
4. Typing indicators show which persona is currently responding
5. User can add/remove personas mid-session
6. Session auto-saves, user can manually save with name

### 3.4 Pipeline Builder (/studio) - UPDATED
**Purpose:** Visual pipeline builder for orchestrating multi-step AI persona processing workflows with sharing and template capabilities

#### 3.4.1 Pipeline List View - UPDATED
**Core Functions:**
- Display Templates section above saved pipelines:
  + Research Report template card
  + Blog Post template card
  + Code Review template card
  + Each template card shows: template name, step count, description
  + \"Use Template\" CTA button on each template card
- Display grid of saved pipelines
- Each pipeline card shows: pipeline name, step count, last run timestamp
- \"New Pipeline\" CTA button
- \"Import from JSON\" button
- Click pipeline card to open editor view
- Delete pipeline option on card hover

**Visual Requirements:**
- Templates section with amber/gold accent to differentiate from user pipelines
- Template cards with distinct visual style
- Bento-style card grid with glassmorphism effect for user pipelines
- Pipeline cards with hover lift effect
- Empty state with illustration and \"Create Your First Pipeline\" CTA
- Loading skeleton cards

#### 3.4.2 Pipeline Editor View - UPDATED
**Core Functions:**
- Pipeline name input field at top
- Toolbar with buttons:
  + Share button (generates public share link)
  + Export to JSON button (downloads pipeline configuration)
  + Save pipeline button
  + Delete pipeline button
- Visual node chain (horizontal scrollable card chain):
  + Each step displayed as card with arrow connecting to next step
  + \"Add Step\" button at end of chain
  + Delete step button on each card
- Step configuration panel (appears when step card clicked):
  + Persona selector dropdown (pick from persona library)
  + Custom instruction/prompt override textarea
  + Pass-through toggle (when enabled, output of step N becomes input of step N+1)
- Pipeline execution panel:
  + Initial input textarea (user types starting input)
  + \"Run Pipeline\" button
  + Step-by-step streaming output display (shows each step's output as it processes)
- Run history section:
  + Display last 10 pipeline runs
  + Each run shows: timestamp, initial input, final output
  + Click run to view full step-by-step output

**Visual Requirements:**
- Toolbar with glassmorphism effect
- Share and Export buttons with distinct icons
- Horizontal scrollable node chain with smooth scroll
- Step cards with glassmorphism effect
- Arrows between steps with animated flow effect
- Configuration panel as sidebar or modal
- Streaming output with typing animation
- Run history as collapsible accordion or table
- Electric violet accent on active step during execution

**Interaction Flow:**
1. User creates new pipeline or opens existing pipeline
2. User adds steps to pipeline (minimum 1 step)
3. For each step, user selects persona, optionally adds custom instruction, enables/disables pass-through
4. User saves pipeline with name
5. User can share pipeline via Share button (generates public link)
6. User can export pipeline via Export button (downloads JSON file)
7. User types initial input in execution panel
8. User clicks \"Run Pipeline\"
9. Pipeline executes step-by-step:
   - Step 1 processes initial input, displays streaming output
   - If pass-through enabled, Step 2 receives Step 1 output as input
   - If pass-through disabled, Step 2 receives original initial input
   - Process continues until all steps complete
10. Final output displayed, run saved to history
11. User can view past runs in history section

#### 3.4.3 Pipeline Public Share Page (/studio/share/:shareId) - NEW
**Purpose:** Public page for viewing and cloning shared pipelines

**Core Functions:**
- Display pipeline name
- Display steps overview (read-only):
  + Each step shows: persona name, custom instruction (if any), pass-through status
- Display collaboration mode (sequential)
- \"Clone to My Studio\" button:
  + Copies pipeline to viewer's account
  + Redirects to pipeline editor with cloned pipeline

**Visual Requirements:**
- Glassmorphism panels for pipeline details
- Read-only step cards with visual styling matching editor
- Prominent \"Clone to My Studio\" CTA button
- Electric violet accent on interactive elements

**Interaction Flow:**
1. User receives share link from pipeline creator
2. User opens share link in browser
3. User views pipeline details (name, steps, collaboration mode)
4. User clicks \"Clone to My Studio\" button
5. Pipeline copied to user's account
6. User redirected to pipeline editor with cloned pipeline

#### 3.4.4 Pipeline Templates - NEW
**Purpose:** Built-in templates for common pipeline workflows

**Template Definitions:**

**Research Report Template:**
- Name: Research Report
- Description: Gather facts, identify patterns, produce final report
- Steps:
  1. Researcher persona: Gathers facts and information
  2. Analyst persona: Identifies patterns and insights
  3. Writer persona: Produces final report
- Collaboration mode: Sequential

**Blog Post Template:**
- Name: Blog Post
- Description: Brainstorm angles, draft content, polish and improve
- Steps:
  1. Ideator persona: Brainstorms angles and ideas
  2. Writer persona: Drafts content
  3. Editor persona: Polishes and improves
- Collaboration mode: Sequential

**Code Review Template:**
- Name: Code Review
- Description: Find bugs, check vulnerabilities, suggest improvements
- Steps:
  1. Reviewer persona: Finds bugs and issues
  2. Security Analyst persona: Checks vulnerabilities
  3. Optimizer persona: Suggests improvements
- Collaboration mode: Sequential

**Interaction Flow:**
1. User opens Pipeline Builder list view
2. User sees Templates section at top
3. User clicks \"Use Template\" on desired template
4. Template cloned to user's pipelines
5. User redirected to pipeline editor with cloned template
6. User can customize template (rename, modify steps, run pipeline)

### 3.5 Persona Library Page (/personas) - COMPLETED
**Purpose:** Full searchable library with category filters and preview modals

**Core Functions:**
- Category filter tabs: All / Friendly / Professional / Blunt / Playful / Custom
- Search bar with real-time filtering
- Persona cards displaying: emoji avatar, name, description, tone badge, memory badge
- Persona preview modal on card click:
  + Full persona details
  + Sample conversation preview
  + \"Start Chat\" CTA
  + \"Add to Group Chat\" CTA
  + \"Add to Pipeline\" CTA
- 1-click start chat button on each card
- Empty state with CTA to create persona
- Loading skeleton cards

**Visual Requirements:**
- Bento-style card grid (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
- Preview modal with glassmorphism backdrop
- Smooth modal open/close animations
- Card hover lift effect
- Category tabs with active state indicator

### 3.6 AI Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId) - ENHANCED
**Purpose:** Enhanced one-on-one AI chat with additional controls

**Core Functions:**
- Model selector dropdown showing current model with provider badge (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
- Web search toggle in input bar (enable/disable web search for current message)
- Persona quick-switch in sidebar history (switch active persona without leaving chat)
- Export conversation button with format options:
  + Export as PDF
  + Export as Markdown
- Maintain existing functionality: conversation sidebar, chat view, persona selection, chat input

**Visual Requirements:**
- Model selector dropdown with provider icons
- Web search toggle as icon button with active state
- Persona quick-switch as dropdown in sidebar
- Export button with dropdown menu
- Smooth transitions for all new controls

### 3.7 Credits & Pricing Page (/credits) - STRIPE INTEGRATION COMPLETE
**Purpose:** Complete Stripe integration with purchase flow and transaction history

**Core Functions:**
- Monthly/Annual toggle with \"Save 25%\" badge
- 3-tier pricing structure: Starter (free), Pro ($9/mo), Creator ($29/mo)
- Purchase flow:
  + Click \"Subscribe\" on plan card
  + Redirect to Stripe Checkout
  + Handle success/cancel callbacks
  + Update user credits and plan status
- Transaction history section:
  + Display past purchases with date, amount, plan, status
  + Download invoice button per transaction
- FAQ accordion section
- Trust row: \"SSL Secured · Cancel Anytime · Instant Access\"

**Visual Requirements:**
- Pro plan highlighted with gradient border and \"Most Popular\" badge
- Transaction history as table with pagination
- Loading states during Stripe redirect
- Success/error messages after purchase

### 3.8 Settings Page (/settings) - UPDATED
**Purpose:** Complete API key management and recent activity history with filtering

**Core Functions:**
- API key management section listing all supported providers:
  + OpenAI
  + Anthropic
  + Google (Gemini)
  + Groq
  + Perplexity
  + Others as supported
- Add key flow:
  + Click \"Add Key\" for provider
  + Enter API key in secure input
  + Test key button to verify validity
  + Save key to user account
- Remove key flow:
  + Click \"Remove\" on existing key
  + Confirm deletion
- Test key flow:
  + Click \"Test\" on existing key
  + Display success/error message
- Account preferences section
- Recent activity section with filter tabs:
  + Filter tabs: All / Chat / Pipeline / Group Chat / Persona
  + Each tab shows count badge of items in that category
  + Active tab highlighted with electric violet accent
  + Display last 20 activity items filtered by selected tab
  + Activity types: conversations, persona creations, room joins, pipeline runs, group chat sessions
  + Timestamp and description per item
  + Pagination or infinite scroll
  + Empty state per filter type (\"No pipeline runs yet\", \"No group chats yet\", etc.)

**Visual Requirements:**
- Provider cards with logos
- Secure input fields (masked text)
- Test/Remove buttons with loading states
- Success/error toast notifications
- Activity filter tabs with count badges
- Active tab with electric violet accent
- Recent activity as timeline or list with icons
- Empty state illustrations per filter type
- Glassmorphism panels for sections

### 3.9 Global Design Upgrade - PRODUCTION STANDARD
**Purpose:** Elevate entire platform to 2026 next-gen SaaS aesthetic

**Core Functions:**
- Apply glassmorphism panels to all card components
- Add animated gradient accents to hero sections
- Implement particle/grid background on hero sections
- Add smooth page transitions between routes
- Implement micro-animations on interactive elements:
  + Button hover effects
  + Card lift on hover
  + Input focus animations
  + Loading spinners
  + Success/error state animations

**Visual Requirements:**
- Glassmorphism: semi-transparent panels with backdrop blur
- Animated gradients: subtle color shifts on hero backgrounds
- Particle effects: floating particles or grid lines on hero sections
- Page transitions: fade or slide animations between routes
- Micro-animations: 200-300ms duration, smooth easing
- Consistent electric violet accent color
- Dark-first editorial aesthetic maintained

### 3.10 Existing Pages (Maintained)
**No Changes Required:**
- Agent Studio (/agent-studio) - already rebuilt in v19 Phase 7.1
- Contacts Page (/contacts) - already fixed
- System Test Page (/system-test) - already fixed
- Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
- Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
- Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
- Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
- Creator Dashboard (/dashboard)
- First-Run Onboarding Modal
- 404 Not Found Page

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 Multi-Persona Group Chat Logic
- User must select minimum 2 personas, maximum 6 personas
- Each persona responds in sequence after user message
- Each persona sees all prior messages in thread (user message + previous persona responses)
- Typing indicators display with persona avatar color while persona is generating response
- User can add personas mid-session (new persona sees full chat history)
- User can remove personas mid-session (removed persona stops responding)
- Session auto-saves after each message exchange
- User can manually save session with custom name
- Saved sessions persist in Group Chat Sessions List

### 4.2 Pipeline Builder Logic
- Pipeline must have minimum 1 step, no maximum limit
- Each step must have persona selected
- Custom instruction/prompt override is optional per step
- Pass-through toggle logic:
  + When enabled: Step N output becomes Step N+1 input
  + When disabled: Step N+1 receives original initial input
- Pipeline execution:
  + Steps execute sequentially in order
  + Each step displays streaming output in real-time
  + Execution stops if any step fails (error displayed)
  + Final output is last step's output
- Run history stores last 10 runs per pipeline
- Pipelines saved to Supabase with user_id association
- Pipeline name must be unique per user
- Delete pipeline requires confirmation

### 4.3 Pipeline Sharing Logic - NEW
- Share button generates unique share token (UUID)
- Share token stored in pipeline_shares table:
  + Fields: pipeline_id, share_token, created_at
- Share URL format: /studio/share/:shareId
- Public share page accessible without login
- Clone button copies pipeline to viewer's account:
  + Creates new pipeline with same name + \" (Copy)\" suffix
  + Copies all steps with persona names, instructions, pass-through settings
  + Assigns new pipeline to viewer's user_id
- Share link remains valid indefinitely (no expiration)
- Original pipeline owner can revoke share by deleting share token

### 4.4 Pipeline Export/Import Logic - NEW
- Export to JSON:
  + Downloads pipeline configuration as .json file
  + JSON structure includes: pipeline name, steps array (persona names, custom instructions, pass-through settings), collaboration mode
  + File naming format: [pipeline-name]-[timestamp].json
- Import from JSON:
  + User clicks \"Import from JSON\" button in pipeline list
  + File upload dialog opens
  + User selects .json file
  + System validates JSON structure
  + Creates new pipeline from JSON data
  + Assigns new pipeline to user's account
  + Redirects to pipeline editor with imported pipeline
- JSON validation checks:
  + Required fields present (pipeline name, steps array)
  + Persona names exist in user's persona library
  + Pass-through settings are boolean values

### 4.5 Pipeline Templates Logic - NEW
- Templates hardcoded in frontend (no database storage)
- Templates section displayed above user pipelines in list view
- 3 templates available:
  + Research Report (3 steps: Researcher, Analyst, Writer)
  + Blog Post (3 steps: Ideator, Writer, Editor)
  + Code Review (3 steps: Reviewer, Security Analyst, Optimizer)
- \"Use Template\" button clones template to user's pipelines:
  + Creates new pipeline with template name
  + Copies all steps with persona names and instructions
  + Assigns new pipeline to user's user_id
  + Redirects to pipeline editor with cloned template
- Template personas must exist in user's persona library or system defaults
- Templates use sequential collaboration mode

### 4.6 Settings Activity Filter Logic - NEW
- Activity filter tabs: All / Chat / Pipeline / Group Chat / Persona
- Filtering is client-side (no new API calls)
- Filter logic:
  + All: displays all activity items
  + Chat: displays only AI chat conversation activities
  + Pipeline: displays only pipeline creation and execution activities
  + Group Chat: displays only group chat session activities
  + Persona: displays only persona creation activities
- Count badges:
  + Each tab shows count of items in that category
  + Count updates dynamically when activities load
- Active tab highlighted with electric violet accent
- Empty state per filter type:
  + \"No chat conversations yet\" for Chat tab
  + \"No pipeline runs yet\" for Pipeline tab
  + \"No group chats yet\" for Group Chat tab
  + \"No personas created yet\" for Persona tab
- Activity list updates immediately when tab clicked

### 4.7 Dashboard Stats Logic
- Total conversations: count of all AI chat conversations
- Personas created: count of user-created personas
- Debate rooms joined: count of rooms user has participated in
- Credits remaining: current credit balance
- Recent activity feed removed from Dashboard (moved to Settings)

### 4.8 Sidebar Navigation Logic
- Active state highlights current page with electric violet accent
- Hover effects on all navigation items
- Section dividers separate Core Features, Tools, Account
- Pipeline Builder added to Core Features section
- BETA badge persists in footer area
- Give Feedback link opens feedback form or external tool

### 4.9 Persona Library Logic
- Category filter tabs: All shows all personas, other tabs filter by tone
- Search bar filters by persona name or description
- Search and filter work together (AND logic)
- Persona preview modal opens on card click
- \"Start Chat\" in modal redirects to /chat with selected persona
- \"Add to Group Chat\" in modal adds persona to group chat session
- \"Add to Pipeline\" in modal adds persona to current pipeline step (if in pipeline editor context)
- 1-click start chat button on card redirects to /chat with selected persona
- Empty state shown when no personas match filters

### 4.10 AI Chat Enhancements Logic
- Model selector dropdown displays current model with provider badge
- Clicking model selector opens dropdown with all available models
- Web search toggle enables/disables web search for next message only
- Persona quick-switch dropdown in sidebar allows switching active persona without leaving chat
- Export conversation button opens dropdown with PDF/Markdown options
- Export generates file and triggers download

### 4.11 Stripe Integration Logic
- Clicking \"Subscribe\" on plan card redirects to Stripe Checkout
- Stripe Checkout pre-filled with user email
- Success callback updates user plan and credits in database
- Cancel callback returns user to Credits page with message
- Transaction history displays all completed purchases
- Invoice download button fetches invoice from Stripe and triggers download

### 4.12 API Key Management Logic
- Add key flow validates key format before saving
- Test key flow sends test request to provider API
- Test success displays green checkmark and success message
- Test failure displays red X and error message
- Remove key flow requires confirmation before deletion
- Masked input fields hide API key characters except last 4

### 4.13 Routing Logic
- Dashboard (/) is default landing page
- /group-chat displays Group Chat Sessions List
- /group-chat/:sessionId displays Group Chat Room for specific session
- /chat/:conversationId displays AI Chat Interface for specific conversation
- /studio displays Pipeline Builder (list view by default)
- /studio/:pipelineId displays Pipeline Editor for specific pipeline
- /studio/share/:shareId displays Pipeline Public Share Page
- All other routes remain unchanged from v17

### 4.14 Existing Functionality Preserved
- All Phase 1-4 features continue working
- No paywall introduced
- No login requirement changes
- Multi-model support unchanged
- Image generation and input capabilities maintained
- Real-time messaging and fact-checking unchanged
- Persona creation, sharing, and management unchanged
- Credits system unchanged

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| User selects fewer than 2 personas for group chat | Display error message: \"Select at least 2 personas\" |
| User selects more than 6 personas for group chat | Disable selection after 6th persona, show message: \"Maximum 6 personas\" |
| Persona fails to respond in group chat | Display error message in chat thread, skip to next persona |
| User removes all personas mid-session | Display message: \"Add at least 2 personas to continue\" |
| Group chat session fails to save | Display error toast, retry save automatically |
| Pipeline has no steps | Display error message: \"Add at least 1 step to pipeline\" |
| Pipeline step has no persona selected | Display error message: \"Select a persona for each step\" |
| Pipeline execution fails mid-step | Display error message in output panel, stop execution, save partial run to history |
| Pipeline name already exists | Display error message: \"Pipeline name already exists, choose another name\" |
| Pipeline save fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Pipeline delete fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Share button clicked but share token generation fails | Display error toast: \"Failed to generate share link, please try again\" |
| Share link accessed but pipeline not found | Display 404 page with message: \"Pipeline not found or no longer shared\" |
| Clone button clicked but user not logged in | Redirect to login page, then return to share page after login |
| Clone button clicked but clone fails | Display error toast: \"Failed to clone pipeline, please try again\" |
| Export to JSON fails | Display error toast: \"Failed to export pipeline, please try again\" |
| Import from JSON with invalid file format | Display error message: \"Invalid JSON file format\" |
| Import from JSON with missing required fields | Display error message: \"JSON file missing required fields\" |
| Import from JSON with non-existent persona names | Display warning message: \"Some personas not found, please select replacements\" |
| Template \"Use Template\" button clicked but clone fails | Display error toast: \"Failed to create pipeline from template, please try again\" |
| Template personas not found in user's library | Use system default personas or prompt user to create missing personas |
| Activity filter tab clicked but no activities in that category | Display empty state with message specific to filter type |
| Activity filter count badge fails to update | Display \"0\" as fallback, log error for debugging |
| Activity list fails to filter when tab clicked | Display all activities as fallback, show error message |
| Run history fails to load | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Pass-through toggle causes circular dependency | Not applicable (sequential execution prevents circular dependencies) |
| Custom instruction exceeds character limit | Display character count, disable save when limit exceeded |
| Initial input empty when running pipeline | Display error message: \"Enter initial input to run pipeline\" |
| Dashboard stats fail to load | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Quick-start card CTA fails | Display error toast, log error for debugging |
| Sidebar navigation fails to highlight active page | Fallback to manual active state detection |
| Persona library search returns no results | Display empty state: \"No personas found\" |
| Persona preview modal fails to load | Display error message in modal, provide close button |
| Model selector dropdown fails to load models | Display current model only, show error message |
| Web search toggle fails to enable search | Display error toast, disable toggle |
| Export conversation fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Stripe Checkout redirect fails | Display error message, provide retry button |
| Stripe success callback fails to update database | Log error, display message to contact support |
| Transaction history fails to load | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Invoice download fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| API key test request fails | Display error message with details from provider |
| API key save fails | Display error toast, provide retry button |
| Recent activity fails to load in Settings | Display loading skeleton, show error message after timeout |
| Recent activity pagination fails | Display error toast, disable pagination controls |
| Glassmorphism not supported in browser | Fallback to solid background with opacity |
| Animated gradient causes performance issues | Reduce animation complexity or disable on low-end devices |
| Particle effects cause performance issues | Reduce particle count or disable on low-end devices |
| Page transition stutters | Reduce transition duration or disable transitions |
| Micro-animations cause motion sickness | Respect prefers-reduced-motion, disable animations |
| Group chat typing indicator fails to display | Show generic loading message |
| Persona avatar color conflicts | Use predefined color palette with sufficient contrast |
| Session auto-save fails repeatedly | Display persistent error banner, provide manual save button |
| Pipeline node chain exceeds viewport width | Enable horizontal scroll with scroll indicators |
| Pipeline streaming output fails to display | Display error message, save run to history with error status |
| Share token already exists for pipeline | Reuse existing share token instead of generating new one |
| JSON export file name contains invalid characters | Sanitize file name, replace invalid characters with hyphens |
| JSON import file size exceeds limit | Display error message: \"File size too large, maximum 5MB\" |
| Template section fails to load | Display error message, hide templates section |
| Activity filter tabs fail to render | Display all activities without filters, show error message |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. Dashboard page displays usage stats cards with correct data
2. Dashboard has 4 quick-start cards with working CTAs
3. Dashboard does not display recent activity feed (moved to Settings)
4. Sidebar navigation has 3 sections: Core Features, Tools, Account
5. Sidebar Core Features section includes Pipeline Builder with icon
6. Sidebar shows icons and labels for all navigation items
7. Sidebar highlights active page with electric violet accent
8. Sidebar footer displays BETA badge and Give Feedback link
9. Pipeline Builder list view displays Templates section above saved pipelines
10. Templates section has 3 template cards: Research Report, Blog Post, Code Review
11. Each template card shows template name, step count, description
12. Each template card has \"Use Template\" CTA button
13. Templates section has amber/gold accent to differentiate from user pipelines
14. Pipeline Builder list view displays saved pipelines grid
15. Pipeline Builder list view has \"New Pipeline\" CTA
16. Pipeline Builder list view has \"Import from JSON\" button
17. Pipeline card shows pipeline name, step count, last run timestamp
18. Pipeline editor view has pipeline name input field
19. Pipeline editor toolbar has Share button
20. Pipeline editor toolbar has Export to JSON button
21. Pipeline editor toolbar has Save Pipeline button
22. Pipeline editor toolbar has Delete Pipeline button
23. Pipeline editor displays visual node chain with horizontal scroll
24. Pipeline editor allows adding steps with \"Add Step\" button
25. Pipeline editor allows deleting steps with delete button per card
26. Step configuration panel has persona selector dropdown
27. Step configuration panel has custom instruction/prompt override textarea
28. Step configuration panel has pass-through toggle
29. Pipeline execution panel has initial input textarea
30. Pipeline execution panel has \"Run Pipeline\" button
31. Pipeline execution displays step-by-step streaming output
32. Pass-through toggle correctly passes output from step N to step N+1
33. Pipeline run history displays last 10 runs
34. Run history shows timestamp, initial input, final output per run
35. Share button generates unique share token and displays share URL
36. Share URL format is /studio/share/:shareId
37. Pipeline Public Share Page displays pipeline name
38. Pipeline Public Share Page displays steps overview (read-only)
39. Pipeline Public Share Page displays collaboration mode
40. Pipeline Public Share Page has \"Clone to My Studio\" button
41. Clone button copies pipeline to viewer's account
42. Clone button redirects to pipeline editor with cloned pipeline
43. Export to JSON button downloads pipeline configuration as .json file
44. JSON file includes pipeline name, steps array, collaboration mode
45. Import from JSON button opens file upload dialog
46. Import from JSON validates JSON structure
47. Import from JSON creates new pipeline from JSON data
48. Import from JSON redirects to pipeline editor with imported pipeline
49. \"Use Template\" button clones template to user's pipelines
50. \"Use Template\" button redirects to pipeline editor with cloned template
51. Template cloning creates new pipeline with template name and steps
52. Pipeline execution stops and displays error if step fails
53. Pipeline name must be unique per user
54. Pipeline delete button deletes pipeline with confirmation
55. Settings page displays Recent Activity section with filter tabs
56. Activity filter tabs include: All, Chat, Pipeline, Group Chat, Persona
57. Each activity filter tab shows count badge of items in that category
58. Active activity filter tab highlighted with electric violet accent
59. Activity list filters by selected tab (client-side filtering)
60. Activity list displays last 20 activity items filtered by selected tab
61. Activity list shows activity type icon, description, timestamp per item
62. Activity list supports pagination or infinite scroll
63. Empty state displayed per filter type when no activities match
64. Empty state messages: \"No chat conversations yet\", \"No pipeline runs yet\", \"No group chats yet\", \"No personas created yet\"
65. Group Chat Sessions List displays saved sessions with previews
66. Group Chat Sessions List has \"New Group Chat\" CTA
67. Group Chat Room allows selecting 2-6 personas from library
68. Group Chat Room displays user message followed by persona responses in sequence
69. Each persona in group chat sees prior persona responses
70. Typing indicators display with persona avatar color during response generation
71. User can add personas mid-session in group chat
72. User can remove personas mid-session in group chat
73. Group chat session auto-saves after each message exchange
74. User can manually save group chat session with custom name
75. Persona Library has category filter tabs: All, Friendly, Professional, Blunt, Playful, Custom
76. Persona Library has search bar with real-time filtering
77. Persona Library displays cards with emoji avatar, name, description, badges
78. Persona preview modal opens on card click
79. Persona preview modal has \"Start Chat\", \"Add to Group Chat\", and \"Add to Pipeline\" CTAs
80. 1-click start chat button on persona card redirects to /chat
81. AI Chat has model selector dropdown showing current model with provider badge
82. AI Chat has web search toggle in input bar
83. AI Chat has persona quick-switch in sidebar history
84. AI Chat has export conversation button with PDF/Markdown options
85. Credits page has complete Stripe integration with purchase flow
86. Credits page displays transaction history with past purchases
87. Transaction history has download invoice button per transaction
88. Settings page lists all supported API key providers
89. Settings page has add key flow with test and save functionality
90. Settings page has remove key flow with confirmation
91. Settings page has test key flow with success/error messages
92. Glassmorphism panels applied to all card components
93. Animated gradient accents on hero sections
94. Particle/grid background on hero sections
95. Smooth page transitions between routes
96. Micro-animations on button hover, card lift, input focus
97. All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
98. Electric violet design system applied consistently
99. Dark-first editorial aesthetic maintained
100. /studio route displays Pipeline Builder list view
101. /studio/:pipelineId route displays Pipeline Editor
102. /studio/share/:shareId route displays Pipeline Public Share Page
103. Dashboard (/) is default landing page
104. All existing Phase 1-4 functionality continues working
105. No paywall introduced
106. No login requirement changes
107. Agent Studio page already rebuilt (no changes needed)
108. Contacts page already fixed (no changes needed)
109. System Test page already fixed (no changes needed)
110. All pages feel complete with no hollow placeholders
111. All pages meet 2026 next-gen SaaS design standard
112. Group chat supports minimum 2 personas, maximum 6 personas
113. Group chat typing indicators use distinct avatar colors per persona
114. Pipeline supports minimum 1 step, no maximum limit
115. Share link remains valid indefinitely (no expiration)
116. JSON export file naming format: [pipeline-name]-[timestamp].json
117. JSON import validates required fields and persona names
118. Templates use sequential collaboration mode
119. Activity filter count badges update dynamically
120. Activity list updates immediately when filter tab clicked

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Voice input/output for group chat or pipelines
- Video avatars for personas in group chat or pipelines
- Real-time collaboration (multiple users in same group chat or pipeline session)
- Group chat session sharing with other users
- Pipeline marketplace or community ratings
- Pipeline versioning or rollback
- Pipeline scheduling or automation
- Pipeline branching or conditional logic
- Pipeline performance metrics or optimization suggestions
- Advanced persona behavior customization (emotion, memory depth)
- Persona marketplace or community ratings
- Advanced analytics dashboard with charts and graphs
- Export group chat sessions or pipeline runs as video or audio
- Custom color schemes per user
- White-label or custom branding options
- Mobile native apps (iOS/Android)
- Offline mode or PWA capabilities
- Advanced API key encryption beyond standard security
- Multi-language support for UI text
- Accessibility audit beyond WCAG AA
- A/B testing framework
- Advanced performance monitoring
- Custom particle effect templates
- Animated background customization per user
- Advanced loading state configurations
- Feedback analytics dashboard
- Beta badge removal mechanism
- Advanced sorting options for persona library or pipeline list
- Saved filter preferences for persona library or activity filters
- Currency selection for pricing page
- Regional pricing for different countries
- FAQ search functionality
- Advanced filtering for transaction history
- Bulk API key import/export
- API key usage analytics
- Custom glassmorphism intensity controls
- Page transition customization per user
- Micro-animation speed controls
- Pipeline templates marketplace or user-submitted templates
- Advanced run history filtering or search
- Export pipeline configuration as YAML
- Pipeline cloning with modifications
- Collaborative pipeline editing
- Pipeline access controls or permissions
- Share link expiration settings
- Share link password protection
- Share link analytics (view count, clone count)
- JSON import with automatic persona mapping
- JSON export with encryption
- Activity export as CSV or PDF
- Activity search functionality
- Activity date range filtering
- Activity notifications or alerts
- Template customization before cloning
- Template preview before using
- Template categories or tags
- User-created templates
- Template rating or feedback system

content.text: {"versionDesc":"Add activity filter tabs, pipeline sharing and export import functionality and built in templates","versionId":"app_version-c0lhaedpy60w","versionLabel":"v23"}
